reviews.comment:
Es un lugar completo para el viajante, una vez al mes paso a entre ríos y paro en el mismo lugar . Baños impecables, venden además unos sandwichs de verdura muy ricos. Aconsejable para parar ahí..todos amables, los playeros y los del bar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a perfect place for travelers. Once a month, I pass through Entre Ríos and stop by the same place. The bathrooms are spotless, and they also sell delicious vegetable sandwiches. A good place to stop—everyone is friendly, both the beachgoers and the bar staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcnVDV0dBEAE
